nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2035; const int b = 2104; const int c = 2121; const int d = 2135; const int e = 2145; const int f = 2155; const int g = 2164; const int h = 2172; const int i = 2180; const int j = 2188; const int k = 2196; const int l = 2205; const int m = 2214; const int n = 2223; const int o = 2234; const int p = 2247; const int q = 2265; const int r = 2333;
